name: phase-implementation-loop
description: Phase-gated implementation workflow with configurable Codex, Cursor, and Claude agent roles.

interface.shortDescription: Run phase-gated implementation plans with selected agent roles.
interface.longDescription: Reconcile markdown plans and Linear issues into a canonical phase plan, choose Codex/Cursor/Claude roles for planning, implementation, and verification, then run gated phase-by-phase implementation with durable handoffs.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $phase-implementation-loop to execute this plan phase by phase.
